title: Tunde Lemo Resigns From GSK Board
description: Former Deputy Governor of Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN), Mr Tunde Lemo has resigned from the board of GlaxoSmithKline Consumer Nigeria Plc, as an Independent Non-Executive Director. According to a sta
html: Former Deputy Governor of Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN), Mr Tunde Lemo has resigned from the board of GlaxoSmithKline Consumer Nigeria Plc, as an Independent Non-Executive Director. According to a statement from the company, the resignation took effects from June 30th, 2019.
